caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political commentary. A female news anchor, dressed in a yellow suit, stands in front of a large screen displaying images of three men, likely political figures. The text on the screen is in Hindi and discusses a topic related to the Congress party, with phrases like "कांग्रेस छुटपटाई" (Congress blunder) and "तेजस्वी की 'पिकर' बाकी है!" (Tejaswi's 'picture' remains!). The anchor seems to be delivering an analysis or report on this political issue, possibly critiquing the Congress party's actions or statements. The lower third of the screen displays additional text in Hindi, indicating that the segment is discussing the return of someone named Nitesh as good news. The overall setting suggests a formal news broadcast with a focus on current political events.
